policy: Curated promotion manifest for full_site pages that have been upgraded from bilingual_draft to bilingual_complete after paragraph-level bilingual coverage and draft-marker removal.

promotions.reason: Core Sdf class page upgraded with paragraph-level bilingual coverage, draft marker removal, and retained API/source terminology.
Core Usd class page upgraded with paragraph-level bilingual coverage for composed prim semantics, property and composition APIs, lifetime, traversal, applied API schemas, and instancing.

Core Sdf path value page upgraded with paragraph-level bilingual coverage for storage-key semantics, namespace identity, absolute and relative paths, path syntax, construction helpers, thread-safety, and composition debugging.

Core UsdGeom mesh schema page upgraded with paragraph-level bilingual coverage for point-based primitive semantics, topology arrays, subdivision properties, creases/corners/holes, interpolation, primvars, and schema-wrapper usage.

Core Tf token page upgraded with paragraph-level bilingual coverage for registered-string handles, bounded fixed-symbol usage, token registry behavior, lookup without creation, hashing containers, empty-token semantics, and OpenUSD schema-name usage.

Core Usd stage-cache page upgraded with paragraph-level bilingual coverage for strongly concurrency safe stage sharing, UsdStageCacheContext and UsdStage::Open usage, matching and lookup APIs, erase/clear lifetime boundaries, resolver-context matching, and cache-vs-layer/resolver boundaries.

Core Usd attribute-limits page upgraded with paragraph-level bilingual coverage for limits dictionary metadata, sub-dictionary keys, minimum/maximum storage, soft/hard limits, authored-vs-fallback semantics, clear operations, and UsdAttribute metadata boundaries.

Core Usd validation error page upgraded with paragraph-level bilingual coverage for structured validation results, validator provenance, identifier/name/type/sites/message/data fields, fixer lookup APIs, no-error state, comparison semantics, and common validation-reporting misreads.

Core UsdGeom basis-curves page upgraded with paragraph-level bilingual coverage for batched curve representation, curveVertexCounts layout, type/basis/wrap semantics, segment indexing, interpolation data sizing, Create*Attr authoring boundaries, and tubes/ribbons rendering interpretation.

Core UsdPhysics joint page upgraded with paragraph-level bilingual coverage for rigid-body joint constraints, body relationship targets, local joint frames, default D6 semantics, enabled/collision/break attributes, articulation exclusion, Create-vs-Get authoring boundaries, and runtime solver responsibility.
